introSection: Mega-Blitz was a steel roller coaster located at Coney Beach Pleasure Park in Porthcawl, Bridgend, Wales, UK. It opened in 1996. This roller coaster was closed in 2009 and put in storage. It was eventually scrapped in 2016.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: When it first opened, this coaster had white track and green supports, later being repainted to feature yellow track and teal supports.

fullText:
Mega-Blitz was a steel roller coaster located at Coney Beach Pleasure Park in Porthcawl, Bridgend, Wales, UK. It opened in 1996. This roller coaster was closed in 2009 and put in storage. It was eventually scrapped in 2016.



When it first opened, this coaster had white track and green supports, later being repainted to feature yellow track and teal supports.
